message:
feat(entropy): add operational telemetry counters to EntropyScheduler [ft-3kxe.18]

Wire 7 counters (panes_registered, panes_added, panes_unregistered,
byte_feeds, total_bytes_fed, schedules_computed, warmup_completions)
into EntropyScheduler methods. Add 12 unit tests and 5 property tests
validating counter accuracy, monotonicity, and serde roundtrip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
